allowed_methods: review packet density conditioned on source_type_diversity
pattern type conditioned on observed value
claim_boundary: Phase 13 uses secondary-condition descriptive metadata math only. It does not claim production monitoring, content validation, contradiction detection, causal inference, prediction, validated anomaly detection, alert readiness, autonomous action, or truth resolution.
phase13_goal: Compute conditional metadata summaries over worldwide artifacts while avoiding causal, predictive, truth, alert, or validated anomaly claims.
purpose: Apply bounded secondary-condition math overlays to detect metadata patterns that appear only under another condition such as category, source type, source-type diversity, uncertainty label, or claim-safety label.
